# Fiber Raman Suppression

Raman-suppression simulation, optimization, and result-generation workflows for
nonlinear fiber propagation. This file is a compact map for agents and LLM
tools; it is not a full documentation dump.

## Start Here

- [Project README](README.md): Project overview, supported research lanes,
  first commands, and repository layout.
- [Human documentation index](docs/README.md): Curated map of user guides,
  architecture docs, reports, status notes, and research notes.
- [Agent documentation index](agent-docs/README.md): Curated map of agent
  continuity notes and current context.
- [Agent operating rules](AGENTS.md): Short mandatory operating contract for
  agents.
- [Long-form project manual](CLAUDE.md): Detailed conventions, architecture,
  compute workflow, and session hygiene.

## Supported Workflows

- [Supported workflows](docs/guides/supported-workflows.md): Supported versus
  experimental workflow boundary.
- [Installation guide](docs/guides/installation.md): Local setup and
  troubleshooting.
- [Container guide](docs/guides/container.md): Reproducible Docker setup.
- [Configurable experiments](docs/guides/configurable-experiments.md):
  Maintained configurable experiment surface.
- [Internal lab release readiness](docs/guides/internal-lab-release-readiness.md):
  Rivera Lab internal handoff blockers, practical readiness gates, and
  first-user sequence.
- [Public release readiness](docs/guides/public-release-readiness.md):
  Release blockers, public metadata gaps, and preview-release sequence.
- [Quickstart optimization](docs/guides/quickstart-optimization.md): Canonical
  single-run optimization.
- [Quickstart sweep](docs/guides/quickstart-sweep.md): Burst VM sweep workflow.
- [Interpreting plots](docs/guides/interpreting-plots.md): Standard image and
  report-card interpretation.

## Architecture And Reference

- [Repo navigation](docs/architecture/repo-navigation.md): Authoritative code
  and workflow boundaries.
- [Output format](docs/architecture/output-format.md): Saved JLD2, JSON, and
  manifest conventions.
- [Cost convention](docs/architecture/cost-convention.md): Cost sign and dB
  reporting conventions.
- [Cost-function physics](docs/architecture/cost-function-physics.md): Raman
  band objective, adjoint framing, and physics rationale.
- [Current equation verification](docs/reference/current-equation-verification.pdf):
  Current equation-level verification reference.

## Current Research Status

- [Research closure report](docs/reports/research-closure-2026-04-28/REPORT.md):
  End-of-exploration lane classification and packaging decisions.
- [MMF readiness report](docs/reports/mmf-raman-readiness-2026-04-28/REPORT.md):
  Qualified multimode readiness status and caveats.
- [Long-fiber 200 m closure](docs/status/longfiber-200m-closure-2026-04-28.md):
  Completed image-backed long-fiber milestone with caveats.
- [Multivar positive result](docs/status/multivar-amp-on-phase-positive-result-2026-04-24.md):
  Staged amplitude-on-phase result.
- [Multivar negative result](docs/status/multivar-canonical-negative-result-2026-04-24.md):
  Direct joint multivariable negative result.
- [MMF window validation](docs/status/mmf-window-validation-2026-04-27.md):
  MMF window validation status.
- [Recent phase synthesis](docs/synthesis/recent-phase-synthesis-29-34.md):
  Compact synthesis of recent phase conclusions.

## Research Notes

- [Research notes index](docs/research-notes/README.md): Paper-style mini-note
  series and quality checklist.
- [Traceability map](docs/research-notes/TRACEABILITY-MAP.md): Code, result,
  and figure traceability across the note series.
- [Verification closure matrix](docs/research-notes/VERIFICATION-CLOSURE-MATRIX.md):
  Note-by-note verification gaps.

## Agent Context

- [Current agent context](agent-docs/current-agent-context/INDEX.md): Entry
  point for durable active context.
- [Methodology notes](agent-docs/current-agent-context/METHODOLOGY.md): Sweep
  windowing and threading findings.
- [Numerics notes](agent-docs/current-agent-context/NUMERICS.md): Numerics
  audit status and remaining cautions.
- [Infrastructure notes](agent-docs/current-agent-context/INFRASTRUCTURE.md):
  Multi-machine compute context.
- [Long-fiber context](agent-docs/current-agent-context/LONGFIBER.md):
  Current long-fiber support boundary.
- [Multimode context](agent-docs/current-agent-context/MULTIMODE.md): Current
  MMF lane status.
- [Multivar context](agent-docs/current-agent-context/MULTIVAR.md): Current
  multivariable optimization lane status.

## Archive Boundary

- [Planning history](docs/planning-history/): Historical GSD and phase archive.
  Use for provenance, not as active project state.
- [Results](results/): Generated run artifacts and figures. Do not treat as
  normal source code unless a current doc explicitly designates a durable
  fixture or summary.
